active.name: Imbricate
active.effects: Reroll the stats on this item, up to twice per round and up to thrice with the [[File:Apex Inventor augment.png|20px|link=]] [[Arena/Augments|Apex Inventor]] augment. Each time you do so, the stats become higher in value.

effects_structured.raw: Reroll the stats on this item, up to twice per round (thrice with Apex Inventor augment). Each reroll increases stat values.
Each reroll increases the item's stat values.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Imbricate is modeled as an Arena-specific per-round reroll mechanic with a base two-reroll cap and Apex Inventor augmentation to three rerolls.
Per-reroll stat growth is behaviorally confirmed but exact per-reroll numeric increments are not exposed in canonical text.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
